title: Basilica of the Divine Motherhood of Our Lady

heroImage.alt: Basilica of the Divine Motherhood of Our Lady, Jharkhand

overview.short: The Basilica of the Divine Motherhood of Our Lady is a minor basilica in Ulhatu, near Ranchi in India.
overview.description: The Basilica of the Divine Motherhood of Our Lady is a minor basilica in Ulhatu, near Ranchi in India. The decree designating it as a basilica was issued on 30 November 2004. In the Roman Catholic Church, the Virgin Mary is regarded not only as the Mother of God but also as the Mother of the Church. The origins of this church can be traced back to 1903, to a remote village called Kawali, where a village primary school was opened and placed under the care of a catechist.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Basilica of the Divine Motherhood of Our Lady?
faq.a: The best time to visit Basilica of the Divine Motherhood of Our Lady is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Basilica of the Divine Motherhood of Our Lady?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Birsa Munda Airport, Ranchi (12 km) and the nearest railway station is Ranchi Junction (14 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Basilica of the Divine Motherhood of Our Lady?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Basilica of the Divine Motherhood of Our Lady at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Basilica of the Divine Motherhood of Our Lady?
faq.a: Stays in Basilica of the Divine Motherhood of Our Lady start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Basilica of the Divine Motherhood of Our Lady?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rampur, Jharkhand, Bargarwa, Namkum, Ranchi, Ara, Ranchi, Namkum.
